3223210.name: Arrogant
3223210.description: This game is a fast-paced flight simulation mini-game where you soar between skyscrapers. Using the AD keys, control the plane's direction, carefully avoiding any collision with towering buildings. The game's visuals exude a futuristic cityscape, with glass facades of skyscrapers reflecting dazzling light, and the skyline changing constantly as you navigate through it. Tense background music combined with crisp flying sound effects creates an immersive experience. This game tests players' reflexes and hand-eye coordination, making it an ideal choice for those who enjoy pushing their limits.
